title: Beehiiv vs SendGrid (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Beehiiv vs SendGrid: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Beehiiv and SendGrid comes down to your specific use case. Beehiiv is built for newsletter publishers and media operators, while SendGrid targets developers and high-volume senders.
choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on newsletter publishers and media operators
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on developers and high-volume senders

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Beehiiv wins for newsletter publishers and media operators, while SendGrid is stronger for developers and high-volume senders.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or SendGrid?
faq.a: SendGrid starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from SendGrid to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
